title: crotalaria barbata
intro: Crotalaria barbata, also known as hairy stickseed, is a perennial herb native to tropical Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The health benefits of Crotalaria barbata include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as prevent the spread of infections. Herbal preparations of Crotalaria barbata can be made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water or by extracting the roots and leaves with solvents to create tinctures or extracts.
